sections.paragraph:
- Original: σῖτος

- Transliteration: Sitos

- Phonetic: see'-tos

- Definition:

1. wheat, grain

- Origin: plural irregular neuter sita see'-tah, of uncertain derivation

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: σῖτα sita see'-tah is the plural irregular neuter of the first form. Of uncertain derivation; grain especially wheat: - corn wheat.
